creator: o.hushchenkov@gmail.com
text:
I'm going to close this one.
Some one did set maintainer-feedback to "+", but there is no any feedback from the maintainer for six years.
I expected to see from the maintainer, at least, feedback about possibility to add an option to explicitly use base/ports ncurses libs.
Probably the maintainer is very busy.

The issue is wider than this one port. Software from FreeBSD ports links to base/ports ncurses in a messy way.

The same for all duplicated in base system libraries, such as openssl. But for openssl one can add DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl into /etc/make.conf and it works.
